items.description: Characters or words animate in with fade, slide-up, or blur and stagger
items.name: text-reveal

items.description: Characters scramble through random glyphs before resolving to the final text
items.name: text-scramble

items.description: Text scrambles on hover then resolves back to original
items.name: scramble-hover

items.description: Characters appear one by one with an optional blinking cursor
items.name: typewriter

items.description: Cycles through an array of strings with smooth exit and enter transitions
items.name: text-loop

items.description: Smooth character-level morphing between two strings using shared layout
items.name: text-morph

items.description: Words roll in and out vertically like a slot machine
items.name: text-roll

items.description: Words flip in 3D on a timer along X or Y axis rotation
items.name: flip-words

items.description: Rotating text with configurable enter/exit animations and stagger
items.name: text-rotate

items.description: Text reveals with a vertical clip-path wipe per character, word, or line
items.name: vertical-cut-reveal

items.description: Each letter swaps position vertically on hover
items.name: letter-swap-hover

items.description: Letters rotate in 3D space on hover revealing a second face
items.name: letter-3d-swap

items.description: Letters swap in random order on hover for a glitchy effect
items.name: random-letter-swap

items.description: Gradient shine sweeps across text continuously
items.name: text-shimmer

items.description: Wave-like shimmer ripples across text characters
items.name: text-shimmer-wave

items.description: Animated gradient colors flowing through text
items.name: text-gradient

items.description: Background highlight animates behind text on scroll or hover
items.name: text-highlight

items.description: Animates from a start value to a target number
items.name: counting-number

items.description: Digits slide up or down independently when value changes (odometer style)
items.name: sliding-number

items.description: Text arranged in a circle rotating continuously
items.name: spinning-text

items.description: Text follows an SVG path, optionally animated
items.name: text-along-path

items.description: Characters scale and opacity pulse in a wave pattern using variable fonts
items.name: breathing-text

items.description: Text splits into characters or words with individual animation control
items.name: splitting-text

items.description: Text rolls in from top or bottom with 3D perspective
items.name: rolling-text

items.description: Single-slot word rotator with configurable transitions

items.description: Characters animate in with randomized vibrant colors

items.description: Characters decrypt from gibberish in a military terminal style

items.description: Words fade in sequentially as if being AI-generated
